name: media-plugin
description: Media generation and manipulation for Claude Code — images, videos/GIFs, music, text-to-speech, and data visualizations (charts, graphs, diagrams, maps) using Google Gemini, D3.js, and Mermaid.

media-mcp.description: AI-powered media generation (image, video, music, speech) via Google Gemini

ElevenLabs.description: Text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio tools via ElevenLabs

mermaid.description: Mermaid diagram generation for architecture and documentation

media-playwright.description: Browser automation for rendering D3.js charts and capturing screenshots
